sourceMovie.title: The Voyeurs
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: The Voyeurs works as a thriller movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The film leans hard into its core genre, which is exactly what fans say they wanted more of from blockbusters in that era.

recommendations.title: Se7en
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If The Voyeurs clicked for you, Se7en (1995) is a strong next stop: both trade in thriller, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: Whiplash
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If The Voyeurs clicked for you, Whiplash (2014) is a strong next stop: both trade in thriller, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after The Voyeurs?
faq.answer: Try Se7en, Whiplash, Mission: Impossible—each shares DNA with The Voyeurs while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is The Voyeurs?
faq.answer: The Voyeurs (2021) is best described as Thriller. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is The Voyeurs worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.5/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this thriller lane.
